seo.title: Home
seo.description: HTCOACHING - Personalized training programs with professional coaches. Boxing, Gym & Cardio for effective muscle gain and fat loss in Ho Chi Minh City. Sign up now!

hero.subtitle: Training & nutrition plans personalized to your body, with daily progress tracking on Notion.

about.title: YOUR TRANSFORMATION PARTNER
about.quote: "There's no great body in the comfort zone. Either change — or stay the same forever."
about.bio: I'm Thien — a professional personal trainer with over 4 years of hands-on experience, who has personally transformed the physiques of more than 50 clients with all different body types. Muscle gain, fat loss, and greater discipline every day are what you'll achieve training with me.
style_items: Passionate, disciplined, friendly — right by your side every session
Real motivation – No sugarcoating, straight to what you need to fix
Personalized roadmap – Right technique, right nutrition, hitting your goals
With the motto NO PAIN NO GAIN, I'll push you beyond your limits.

tools.title: FREE TOOLS
tools.subtitle: Experience our smart nutrition calculation and meal suggestion ecosystem, completely free from HTCoaching.
tools.tdee_desc: Discover how many calories your body burns daily to optimize your weight gain/loss scientifically.
tools.exercise_desc: Library of 400+ exercises with accurate technical video and image guides.
tools.mealplan_desc: Create the perfect meal plan that fits your target calorie intake.

contact.title: CONTACT US
contact.subtitle: Leave your info and we'll reach out for a free consultation

contact.success_message: Our consultant will contact you shortly.

errors.name: Full name must be at least 8 characters

errors.social_format: Only valid Facebook or Zalo links accepted!
